author: grochowski
description: Focus the file explorer on chosen folder and its files and subdirectories, while hiding all the other elements.

manifest.description: Focus file explorer on chosen folder and its files and subdirectories, while hiding all the other elements.

name: Folder Focus Mode

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file. See [commit-and-tag-version](https://github.com/absolute-version/commit-and-tag-version) for commit guidelines.

### [0.9.13](https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/compare/0.9.12...0.9.13) (2024-07-04)

Bugfix: Folder can't be expanded after being collapsed in focus mode. (https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/pull/21)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file. See [commit-and-tag-version](https://github.com/absolute-version/commit-and-tag-version) for commit guidelines.

### [0.9.12](https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/compare/0.9.11...0.9.12) (2023-03-01)


### Bug Fixes

* expand/collapse compatibility (experimental!), explorer buttons ([c2457b7](https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/commit/c2457b79ac8000f3f695b89105b3c05a07da3c53))

releases.author: grochowski
releases.description:
* fix: click events for workspace

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/compare/0.9.10...0.9.11

releases.author: grochowski
releases.description:
- added a parent folder link for simplified view

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/compare/0.9.9...0.9.10

releases.author: grochowski
releases.description:
- feature: added simplified view - after enabling, it hides parent directories when focusing on a folder (saves a lot of space when using nested folders!)
- feature: added new auto-focus setting "Force auto-focus on parent directory", that always keeps focus on a parent directory of currently chosen file (even if the file was already visible on current file tree)
- fix: cleared unnecessary console logs

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/compare/0.9.8...0.9.9

releases.author: grochowski
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: icon misaligned by @Lisandra-dev in https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/pull/8

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/compare/0.9.7...0.9.8

releases.author: grochowski
releases.description:
- fix: display glitches for long lists should not longer happen
- fix: focus mode button behaviour is fixed (it did not change the icon when focus mode was toggled using the context menu)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/compare/0.9.6...0.9.7

releases.author: grochowski
releases.description:
- plugin is now working properly for Obsidian 0.15.x
- added optional focus mode icon in file explorer
- added command for quickly changing the auto-focus setting
- integration with [external file strategies](https://github.com/aidenlx/alx-folder-note/wiki/folder-note-pref) plugin

Special thanks to [Mara-Li](https://github.com/Mara-Li) for great work of keeping the plugin up-to-date with new Obsidian releases :) 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/compare/0.9.3...0.9.6

releases.author: grochowski
releases.description:
- added optional 'auto-focus' mode which ensures the plugin focuses automatically on directory of newly opened files, if they are not visible right now (with an option to focus on the first directory from root instead of the closest ancestor)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/compare/0.9.2...0.9.3

releases.author: grochowski
releases.description:
- resolved issues with path library
- minor changes in code

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/compare/0.9.1...0.9.2

releases.author: grochowski
releases.description:
- added 'Unfocus' context menu option for previously chosen folder
- added global 'Enable folder focus mode for active file' command, which enabled folder focus mode for current file's parent directory

**Diff**: https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/compare/v0.9.0...0.9.1

releases.author: grochowski
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/grochowski/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/commits/v0.9.0

Manually installing the plugin - copy over `main.js`, `styles.css`, `manifest.json` to your vault `VaultFolder/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-folder-focus-mode/`.
